## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Engine change
- [ ] Dispatcher change
- [ ] Registry change
- [ ] Runtime / sandbox change
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Dependency change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have signed the CLA.
- [ ] My commits include `Signed-off-by:`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, private data, or proprietary code.
- [ ] I preserved Apache-2.0 license headers where applicable.
- [ ] I declared all new dependencies and their licenses.

## Compatibility

- [ ] This is not a breaking change.
- [ ] This is a breaking change and has an accepted RFC.
- [ ] This changes dispatcher semantics, registry validation, runtime contract, sandbox behavior, or B-face output behavior.

## Security / Privacy

- [ ] This PR does not add network access.
- [ ] This PR does not persist user data.
- [ ] This PR does not change secret handling.
- [ ] This PR does not add shell execution or process spawning.
- [ ] This PR does not add a dependency with native code.
- [ ] If any item above is false, I explained the impact and requested security review.

## AI-assisted contribution responsibility

- [ ] I am responsible for the originality, correctness, licensing, and security of this contribution.
- [ ] This PR does not include proprietary code, private data, secrets, or third-party confidential material.
- [ ] If AI tools were used, I reviewed the output and confirmed that it complies with project license and contribution rules.
